# Deep Auto Care

> Dealership-quality repairs without the dealership price

Honest, warrantied auto repair in Surrey, BC. ASE-style certified technicians, free digital inspections and up-front pricing. Book online or call (604) 555-0123.

## Business
- Name: Deep Auto Care
- Type: Auto repair shop / mechanic
- Founded: 2008
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 612 Google reviews

## Contact
- Phone: (604) 555-0123 (+16045550123)
- Text/SMS: (604) 555-0123
- Email: service@deepautocare.ca
- Address: 12840 Industrial Way, Unit 4, Surrey, BC V3W 5K9, Canada
- Website: https://www.deepautocare.ca/
- Directions: https://maps.google.com/?q=Deep+Auto+Care+Surrey+BC

## Hours
- Monday: 07:30–18:00
- Tuesday: 07:30–18:00
- Wednesday: 07:30–18:00
- Thursday: 07:30–18:00
- Friday: 07:30–18:00
- Saturday: 08:00–16:00
- Sunday: Closed
- Roadside assistance: 24/7

## Services
- Oil & Filter Change: Synthetic and conventional oil changes with a complimentary multi-point inspection.
- Brake Repair: Pads, rotors, calipers and brake fluid service for safe, quiet stopping.
- Transmission Service: Fluid flushes, diagnostics and rebuilds for automatic and manual transmissions.
- Engine Diagnostics: Check-engine light? We pinpoint the real cause, not just the code.
- Battery & Electrical: Testing, replacement and electrical fault-finding for hard starts and dead batteries.
- Suspension & Steering: Shocks, struts, control arms and steering components for a smooth, safe ride.
- Wheel Alignment: Precision laser alignment to extend tire life and fix pulling.
- Air Conditioning Repair: A/C recharge, leak detection and compressor service to keep you cool.
- Tires & Seasonal Swaps: Sales, mounting, balancing and seasonal storage for every season.
- Fleet Maintenance: Priority scheduling and consolidated billing for business fleets.
- Roadside Assistance: 24/7 jump-starts, lockouts and towing back to our shop.

## Service areas
- Surrey (Newton, Guildford, Fleetwood, Cloverdale, South Surrey)
- Langley (Willoughby, Walnut Grove, Brookswood, Fort Langley)
- Delta (North Delta, Ladner, Tsawwassen)
- White Rock (East Beach, West Beach)
- Burnaby (Metrotown, Brentwood, Lougheed)
- Richmond (Steveston, Brighouse, Hamilton)
- Vancouver (Marpole, Kerrisdale, Mount Pleasant)

## How to book
Call or text (604) 555-0123, email service@deepautocare.ca, or use the contact form at https://www.deepautocare.ca/#contact
